CustomField.description: Shows how much was gained or lost in USD because the exchange rate changed between when the invoice was issued and when the payment was made. A positive number means a gain; a negative number means a loss.
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(leaseworks__Multicurrency_Enabled_Checkbox__c), 0, IF( leaseworks__Is_Block_FX_Calculation__c, 0, leaseworks__Amount_Ledger__c - ( leaseworks__Invoice_Exchange_Rate__c * leaseworks__Amount__c) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows how much was gained or lost in USD because the exchange rate changed between when the invoice was issued and when the payment was made. A positive number means a gain; a negative number means a loss.
CustomField.label: FX Gain /Loss
